rationale: Tax Code §25.12 governs listing and joint taxation of mineral interests. The proposed homestead exemption increase under §11.13(b) has no bearing on mineral interest valuation or listing procedures.
quote: Except as provided by Subsection (b) of this section, each separate interest in minerals in place shall be listed separately from other interests in the minerals in place in the name of the owner of the interest.
_note: No conflict: §25.12 addresses mineral interest listing/joint taxation, unrelated to residence homestead exemption amounts in §11.13(b).
